ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author or lead researcher of the trial */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the trial was conducted */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year when the trial was conducted */,
  "design_duration" TEXT /* Design and duration of the trial */,
  "subject_number" TEXT /* Number of subjects involved in the trial */,
  "male_female_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of male to female subjects */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., ongoing, completed, cancelled) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the trial */,
  "study_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the trial */,
  "inclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Inclusion criteria for subject selection */,
  "exclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Exclusion criteria for subject selection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial the subject is part of */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "bmi" REAL /* BMI of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the subject */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the subject */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Medications taken by the subject */,
  "dietary_habits" TEXT /* Dietary habits of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment protocol */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial the treatment is part of */,
  "treatment_protocol" TEXT /* Description of the treatment protocol */,
  "treatment_dose" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "control_protocol" TEXT /* Description of the control protocol */,
  "control_dose" TEXT /* Dosage of the control */,
  "probiotic_strains" TEXT /* Probiotic strains used in the treatment */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the probiotic strains (CFU/mL) */,
  "administration_route" TEXT /* Route of administration (e.g., oral, topical) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_probiotic_strains FOREIGN KEY ("probiotic_strains") REFERENCES probiotic_strains ("strain_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "glycemic_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each glycemic outcome */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the outcome is for */,
  "a1c" REAL /* A1c level */,
  "fbg" REAL /* Fasting blood glucose level */,
  "insulin" REAL /* Insulin level */,
  "homa_ir" REAL /* Homeostasis model assessment of insulin resistance */,
  "c_peptide" REAL /* C-peptide level */,
  "proinsulin" REAL /* Proinsulin level */,
  "glucose_tolerance" REAL /* Glucose tolerance test results */,
  "insulin_sensitivity" REAL /* Insulin sensitivity index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_glycemic_outcomes_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "probiotic_strains" (
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each probiotic strain */,
  "strain_name" TEXT /* Name of the probiotic strain */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the probiotic strain (CFU/mL) */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the probiotic strain */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the probiotic strain */,
  "strain_type" TEXT /* Type of probiotic strain (e.g., Lactobacillus, Bifidobacterium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial the investigator is part of */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the investigator */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the investigator (e.g., PI, co-PI) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investigator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_investigators_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial the site is part of */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the site */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the site */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_sites_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adverse_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adverse event */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject who experienced the adverse event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of adverse event (e.g., nausea, headache) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the adverse event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the adverse event (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "relatedness" TEXT /* Relatedness of the adverse event to the treatment (e.g., related, unrelated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)
